meta.title: GCP-ADP-5: Ingestion, BigQuery Design, and Governed Reporting

questions.stem: A team needs low-cost durable object storage for raw files before transformation. Which Google Cloud service is the best fit?
questions.explanation:
**B** is correct because `Cloud Storage` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

[Cloud Storage overview](https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/introduction)

questions.stem: A business user wants to load CSV files into a managed analytical warehouse for SQL analysis. Which service should hold the structured analytics tables?

**B** is correct because `BigQuery` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

[What is BigQuery?](https://cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/introduction)
